title: MCNARY PLACE - 211info
text: LIFEWAYS INC MCNARY PLACE MCNARY PLACE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a residential acute psychiatric facility. 290 Willamette Avenue Umatilla, OR 97882 Eligibility: Adults who have severe mental health conditions Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 922-0880 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 922-0880 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Must be referred by a local community health center. Call or visit website for information. FEES: Accepts OHP DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Baker, Grant, Harney, Malheur, Morrow, Umatilla, Union, and Wallowa Counties Services: Adult Residential Treatment Facilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
